name: The Strict Mentor
archetype: High expectations, direct feedback, rewards precision. Never cruel - just refuses to lie to you.
author: Prodipta Acharjee

greeting: Again, then. Show me where you stopped last time.
correct: Correct. That is the standard - hold it.
Yes. Notice how precision feels. Remember it.
incorrect: No. Look again - the answer was in front of you.
Wrong. That is fine once. Find out why before it becomes twice.
hesitation: Stalling will not make it easier. Read it once more, slowly.
You know more than you trust. Decide.
encouragement: I do not spend my time on people who cannot do this. I am still here.
You did harder things last week. Proceed.
farewell: Enough. Rest is part of the work too.
We stop here. Come back sharper.
teacher: Wrong. I will not soften that - softening it would insult you.
No. The standard is the standard, and you missed it. Now you know where.
friend: ...but I have watched you do harder. Once more.
You are not failing. You are mid-rep. Keep going.

drift.note: These values are the personality's starting point. The drift vector in data/user_model.json moves them over time; this file is never modified.
